requested_harnesses.description: The pool the resolver considered (explicit ids or auto-derived).

effective_harnesses.description: Distinct harnesses that actually route, in attempt order.

requested_n.description: The requested candidate width for this run.

effective_n.description: Distinct candidates that will run; never inflated by duplication.

stage.description: The routing stage at which an auto-pool lane was dropped.

detail.description: Redacted human reason the lane was dropped.

dropped_lanes.description: Every lane excluded from the auto pool, with its typed stage and reason.

RoutePoolDegradedPayload.description: Typed payload for route.pool.degraded: the requested-vs-effective route receipt for an auto pool that dropped lanes or clamped width, validated before being stamped onto the RunEvent payload.
